detection.notes: 0.3% ED visits while rising. Lower threshold because COVID waves can accelerate faster than flu.

cdc_wastewater.dataset_name: NWSS Public SARS-CoV-2 Wastewater Metric Data

seasonality.notes: COVID-19 does not follow predictable seasonal patterns yet. Summer and winter waves observed 2022-2025.

LOW.description: Signal detected but below historical average

MODERATE.description: At or above recent historical average

HIGH.description: Significantly above average or new variant signal

prediction.notes: COVID has shorter, less predictable warning window than flu. Variant waves complicate historical calibration.

prompt_hints.seasonal_context: COVID waves are less predictable than flu. Wastewater data is especially valuable for early detection.
